info.description: Form text input component for user input

label.description: Visible label shown for the input field

name.description: Machine-friendly field name (used as the input's name/id; no spaces)

type.description: HTML input type or 'textarea' for multi-line input

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed inside the field when empty

iconify.description: Whether to use Iconify for the input field

icon_position.description: Placement of the icon relative to the input field when iconify is enabled
